title: Schedule
description: Cron-based execution schedule for a data platform pipeline.

apiVersion.description: API version for the schedule manifest.

cron.description: Standard 5-field cron expression (minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week). Example: '0 */6 * * *' for every 6 hours.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier. Example: 'UTC', 'America/New_York'. Defaults to UTC.

suspend.description: Whether the schedule is suspended. When true, the schedule is registered but not active.
